question_pattern: timeline of all process execution events on host
spl_template: index=endpoint OR index=edr host="{host}" earliest={earliest} latest=now process_name IN ("powershell.exe","cmd.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe") | eval time=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") | table time, process_name, parent_process_name, command_line, user | sort time | head 200
description: Process execution timeline for ransomware/encoded PowerShell alerts

question_pattern: powershell execution via CIM Endpoint datamodel
spl_template: | datamodel Endpoint Processes search | search process_name=powershell.exe host="{host}" earliest={earliest} latest=now | table _time, host, user, process_name, parent_process_name, process | sort _time

question_pattern: outbound connections to known C2 IP
spl_template: | datamodel Network_Traffic All_Traffic search | search dest="{c2_ip}" earliest={earliest} latest=now | table _time, src, dest, dest_port, bytes_out, action | sort _time
description: C2 beacon detection via CIM Network_Traffic

question_pattern: successful authentication events for compromised user
spl_template: | datamodel Authentication Authentication search | search user="{user}" action=success earliest={earliest} latest=now | table _time, user, src, dest, app | sort _time
description: Confirms account usage after suspected compromise

question_pattern: DNS queries to malicious domain
spl_template: | datamodel Network_Resolution DNS search | search query="*{malicious_domain}*" earliest={earliest} latest=now | table _time, src, query, answer | sort _time
description: DNS resolution evidence for malicious domain IOC

question_pattern: LSASS memory access events on host
spl_template: index=endpoint OR index=edr host="{host}" earliest={earliest} latest=now (process_name="lsass.exe" OR target_process="lsass.exe") | table _time, host, process_name, target_process, access_mask, user | sort _time
description: Credential dumping via LSASS access detection

question_pattern: files renamed with ransomware extensions on host
spl_template: index=endpoint OR index=file_integrity host="{host}" earliest={earliest} latest=now (file_name="*.locked" OR file_name="*.encrypted" OR file_name="*.lockbit") | stats count by host, file_path

question_pattern: large outbound data transfers for user
spl_template: index=network OR index=proxy user="{user}" earliest={earliest} latest=now bytes_out>10485760 | eval mb_out=round(bytes_out/1048576,2) | table _time, src_ip, dest_ip, dest_port, url, mb_out | sort -mb_out | head 100
description: Detects large uploads consistent with data exfiltration

question_pattern: USB mass storage write events for user
spl_template: index=endpoint sourcetype="XmlWinEventLog" EventCode=4663 user="{user}" earliest={earliest} latest=now | table _time, host, user, object_file_path, bytes | sort _time | head 100

question_pattern: bulk SharePoint file downloads by user
spl_template: index=o365 sourcetype="o365:management:activity" Operation=FileDownloaded UserId="{user}" earliest={earliest} latest=now | stats count by ObjectId | sort -count | head 100

question_pattern: failed RDP authentication attempts against host
spl_template: | datamodel Authentication Authentication search | search dest="{host}" app="rdp" action=failure earliest={earliest} latest=now | stats count earliest(_time) as first_seen latest(_time) as last_seen by src, user | sort -count | head 50

question_pattern: any successful RDP logins following failures
spl_template: | datamodel Authentication Authentication search | search dest="{host}" app="rdp" action=success earliest={earliest} latest=now | table _time, src, user, dest | sort _time
description: Checks whether brute force ultimately succeeded

question_pattern: certutil process invocations with arguments
spl_template: | datamodel Endpoint Processes search | search process_name=certutil.exe host="{host}" earliest={earliest} latest=now | table _time, host, user, process, parent_process | sort _time

question_pattern: hosts running binary with mismatched hash
spl_template: | datamodel Endpoint Filesystem search | search file_hash="{bad_hash}" earliest={earliest} latest=now | stats dc(host) as affected_hosts values(host) as hosts by file_name, file_hash
description: Blast radius for supply chain hash mismatch

question_pattern: scheduled tasks created for persistence
spl_template: index=endpoint sourcetype="XmlWinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-TaskScheduler/Operational" EventCode=106 earliest={earliest} latest=now | table _time, host, user, TaskName | sort _time

question_pattern: beaconing connections to C2 over alternate port
spl_template: | datamodel Network_Traffic All_Traffic search | search dest="{c2_ip}" dest_port="{c2_port}" earliest={earliest} latest=now | timechart span=5m count by src

question_pattern: lateral movement via SMB RDP or WMI from host or user
spl_template: | datamodel Authentication Authentication search | search (src="{host}" OR user="{user}") (app="smb" OR app="rdp" OR app="wmi") earliest={earliest} latest=now | table _time, src, dest, user, app, action | sort _time | head 200

question_pattern: top network talkers by bytes for host
spl_template: | datamodel Network_Traffic All_Traffic search | search src="{host}" earliest={earliest} latest=now | stats sum(bytes_out) as bytes_out sum(bytes_in) as bytes_in by dest | sort -bytes_out | head 50
description: Network flow volume summary for host

question_pattern: off hours access for user
spl_template: | datamodel Authentication Authentication search | search user="{user}" action=success earliest={earliest} latest=now | eval hour=strftime(_time,"%H") | where hour<"{baseline_start}" OR hour>"{baseline_end}" | table _time, user, src, dest, hour

question_pattern: impossible travel for user based on geolocation
spl_template: | datamodel Authentication Authentication search | search user="{user}" action=success earliest={earliest} latest=now | iplocation src | table _time, user, src, City, Country | sort _time

question_pattern: asset criticality for host or ip
spl_template: | inputlookup asset_criticality_lookup | search (asset_name="{host}" OR ip_address="{host}") | head 1

question_pattern: check if IOC is on the whitelist
spl_template: | inputlookup ioc_whitelist_lookup | search ioc_value="{ioc_value}" | head 1
description: IOC whitelist check to avoid false positive enrichment
